ad1.on_image_text: Crispy comfort, up to 95% less oil.
ad1.primary_text: Your wellness routine can still make room for crunch. Cosori TurboBlaze air fries with up to 95% less oil than traditional deep frying, helping you turn crispy favorites into lighter home-cooked habits that are easy to come back to.
ad1.headline: Crispy favorites, less oil.
ad1.description: Air fry lighter meals without giving up the texture you love.

ad2.on_image_text: 9 ways to cook. More time to live.
ad2.primary_text: Better meals are easier to choose when they do not take over your night. With DC motor technology, 9 cooking functions, and up to 46% faster cooking, TurboBlaze helps you air fry, roast, bake, broil, dehydrate, proof, reheat, and keep warm from one compact countertop appliance.
ad2.headline: Cook faster. Eat at home more.
ad2.description: Nine functions help simplify the meals, snacks, and routines that keep you moving.

banner1.header: Cook Well, Even on Busy Days
banner1.subhead: With up to 46% faster cooking, TurboBlaze helps home-cooked meals fit real life.

banner2.subhead: Air fry with up to 95% less oil than traditional deep frying - without losing the crunch.

banner3.subhead: Air fry, roast, bake, broil, dehydrate, proof, reheat, and more - then clean up with dishwasher-safe parts.

section_3_email.subject_line_1: Meet the air fryer built for easier home cooking
section_3_email.subject_line_2: Your weeknight reset starts with a crisp
section_3_email.body:
Meet the Cosori TurboBlaze Air Fryer: a simpler way to bring more home-cooked meals into your everyday routine. Powered by DC motor technology, TurboBlaze cooks meals up to 46% faster, while 9 cooking functions make it easy to air fry, roast, bake, broil, dehydrate, proof, reheat, cook from frozen, and keep food warm. And with up to 95% less oil than traditional deep frying, you can enjoy crisp, satisfying texture in a lighter way.

From quick weeknight dinners to better-for-you snacks, TurboBlaze helps make wellness-forward cooking feel less like a project and more like a rhythm.

Shop TurboBlaze and make your next meal easier to start.
section_3_email.ps: P.S. The PFAS-free ceramic-coated basket and crisper plate are dishwasher-safe, so cleanup can be part of the routine instead of the reason you skip it.

wellness_linkage_issues: The newer copy option improves the wellness bridge, but HoloBuild should make every section explicitly answer how the feature changes the user's routine or lifestyle.
The air fryer strategy should be healthier-lifestyle contribution through less-oil home cooking and repeatable routines, not medical or diet outcomes.
rule_violations: Email body word count must be verified mechanically after generation.
tone_drift: Some lines are stronger but still close to functional explanation; final copy should feel more campaign-like without losing evidence discipline.
missing_evidence: Actual Meta Ads Library examples were not captured in the staged seed, but live research is now allowed during generation.
